overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in a red coat and white hat walking through a foggy historic city at night. The character travels from covered sidewalks, crosses a cobblestone street past a moving tram, traverses a park plaza, and enters a train station.

events.description: companion walking ahead stops and looks around before continuing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk following a companion

notable_agents.action: companion in grey coat and hat walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: wooden awning covering the sidewalk supported by iron columns
wet cobblestone road illuminated by warm gas street lamps
cast iron street lamp with warm orange glow cutting through fog
ornate stone building facade with large windows and decorative moldings

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk next to a cobblestone street in a foggy historic city at night. Gas lamps cast warm orange light through the mist. A companion walks ahead, briefly stopping to look around before continuing down the path.

events.description: exits covered walkway and steps onto the open cobblestone street
vintage tram passes by from left to right on the tracks

agents.ego_description: crossing the cobblestone street and walking alongside a moving tram

notable_agents.action: green and red vintage tram moving along tracks through the fog

entered.detail: green and red vintage tram with illuminated windows moving through the fog
series of gas lamps receding into the foggy distance

segments.scene_description: Leaving the covered walkway, the character enters the open cobblestone street as a vintage tram passes by on the tracks. The fog thickens in the open air, with street lamps creating halos of warm light. The character turns to follow the road alongside the moving tram.

events.description: turns corner and enters park plaza with large trees
exits park and approaches the illuminated train station building

agents.ego_description: walking through the park plaza toward the train station entrance

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt and suspenders walking across the plaza

entered.detail: large oak trees with hanging Spanish moss in the plaza
large brick building with stone columns and brightly lit entrance
wooden park bench beneath the trees

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a park plaza with large trees and hanging moss, leaving the street behind. Walking across the grassy area, the train station building becomes visible ahead with its warm lights glowing in the fog. A pedestrian crosses the plaza on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered train station platform with tracks

events.description: enters the train station building from the park plaza
moves from station entrance hall to the covered railway platform

agents.ego_description: walking through the train station entrance and along the platform beside freight cars

notable_agents.action: person in blue shirt sitting on a wooden bench waiting

entered.detail: high metal truss roof with glass panels covering the platform
railway tracks running parallel to the platform
wooden boxcars and freight cars parked on the tracks
wooden waiting benches along the platform wall

segments.scene_description: Entering the train station, the character moves from the foggy outdoors into the sheltered interior. The space opens into a covered platform with a high metal roof structure. Freight cars sit on the tracks to the right as the character walks deeper into the station, passing benches and a waiting passenger.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy historic city at night, transitioning from narrow covered walkways to the expansive interior of a train station. It begins beside a cobblestone street where gas lamps cast a warm orange glow through the mist as the character follows a companion. As the character leaves the shelter of the sidewalk, the scene opens into the street where a vintage tram passes through thickening fog and halos of light. The camera then shifts away from the road and into a park plaza filled with mossy trees, moving across the grass toward the glowing lights of a distant station. Finally, the character moves from the damp outdoor air into the sheltered station, where the environment expands into a high metal roof structure overlooking freight cars and waiting passengers.
